revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:安房神社 (小山市)]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Awa Shrine (Oyama) | native_name = 安房神社 | image = 安房神社 .jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Awa Shrine (Oyama) | coordinates = {{coord|36.290783|139.783471}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Awa Shrine (Oyama)'''|安房神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shimotsuke Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11361380|ltq=Q11361380|qid=Q11361380|1=List of Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province}} ** Series ordinal: 10 ** P155: {{ill|Miwa Shrine|lt=Miwa Shrine|ja|三和神社|qid=Q11354664|1=Miwa Shrine (Nakagawa, Tochigi)}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135039975|ltq=Q135039975|qid=Q135039975|1=Munakatano Shrine (Q135039975)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Oyama, Tochigi|lt=Oyama|ar|أوياما (توتشيغي)|azb|اویاما، توچیقی|ca|Oyama (Tochigi)|ceb|Oyama (lungsod sa Hapon)|ce|Ояма (гӀала)|cs|Ojama (prefektura Točigi)|de|Oyama|en|Oyama, Tochigi|envoyage|Oyama|eo|Ojama (Toĉigi)|es|Oyama (Tochigi)|eu|Oyama (Tochigi)|fa|اویاما، توچیگی|fi|Oyama|fr|Oyama (Tochigi)|gl|Oyama, Tochigi|he|אויאמה|id|Oyama, Tochigi|it|Oyama|ja|小山市|javoyage|小山市|ko|오야마시|mg|Oyama|mzn|اویاما، توچیگی|nl|Oyama (Tochigi)|no|Oyama|pl|Oyama|pt|Oyama|ro|Oyama, Tochigi|ru|Ояма (город)|sh|Ojama|sr|Ојама|sv|Oyama|sw|Oyama, Tochigi|tg|Ояма|tl|Oyama, Tochigi|tr|Oyama, Tochigi|tt|Ояма (шәһәр)|uk|Ояма (Тотіґі)|uz|Oyama (Tochigi)|vi|Oyama, Tochigi|war|Oyama, Tochigi|zh_classical|小山市|zh_min_nan|Oyama-chhī|zh_yue|小山市|zh|小山市|qid=Q374511|1=Oyama, Tochigi}} * {{ill|Q1053699|ltq=Q1053699|qid=Q1053699|1=Shimotsuke Province}} * {{ill|Q11457397|ltq=Q11457397|qid=Q11457397|1=Samukawa district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|36.290783|139.783471}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * 安房神社 .jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182036 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Gō-sha|lt=Gō-sha|ja|郷社|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == legal form (P1454) == * {{ill|Q7311343|ltq=Q7311343|qid=Q7311343|1=religious corporation}} == country (P17) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * あわじんじゃhttps://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == postal code (P281) == * 329-0201https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 2060005004930 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '栃木県小山市粟宮1615', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:安房神社 (小山市)]] {{wikidata link|Q59282622}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Awa Shrine |Image = [[File:Awa Shrine.jpg|270px]]
The third torii gate and the worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|Q44843|qid=Q44843|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Oyama City|Q374511|qid=Q374511|1=Oyama, Tochigi}} Awamiya 1615 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Deities = {{ill|lt=Futodama|Q11059539|qid=Q11059539|qid=Q11059539|lt=Ame-no-Futodama-no-Mikoto|1=Futodama}}
{{ill|lt=Uji no Wakairatsuko|Q11619989|qid=Q11619989|lt=Uji no Wakairatsuko-no-Mikoto|1=Uji no Wakiiratsuko}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=Gōsha|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} |Founded = Unknown |Main hall = {{ill|lt=Nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |Other name = Abo Shrine (former name) |Annual festival = {{ill|lt=November 21|Q3023|qid=Q3023|1=November 21}} |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Tochigi|label=Awa Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Awa Shrine''' (あわじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in Awamiya, {{ill|lt=Oyama City|Q374511|qid=Q374511|1=Oyama, Tochigi}}, {{ill|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|Q44843|qid=Q44843|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}. Its former shrine rank was Gōsha, and it is listed as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor shrine). === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Futodama|Q11059539|qid=Q11059539|qid=Q11059539|lt=Ame-no-Futodama-no-Mikoto|1=Futodama}} (あめのふとだまのみこと) * {{ill|lt=Uji no Wakairatsuko|Q11619989|qid=Q11619989|lt=Uji no Wakairatsuko-no-Mikoto|1=Uji no Wakiiratsuko}} (うじのわきいらつこのみこと) === History === According to shrine tradition, it was founded during the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujin|Q333530|qid=Q333530|1=Emperor Sujin}} and rebuilt during the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Nintoku|Q313119|qid=Q313119|1=Emperor Nintoku}}. In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}, it is recorded under the name “Abo Shrine.” In 939, it is said that Fujiwara no Hidesato prayed here for victory in his campaign against Taira no Masakado and donated shrine lands. In the medieval period, the area was known as Awamiya, and the shrine received patronage from the {{ill|lt=Oyama clan|Q11459903|qid=Q11459903|1=Oyama clan}}, {{ill|lt=Sano clan|Q11385058|qid=Q11385058|1=Sano clan}}, {{ill|lt=Yūki clan|Q2975399|qid=Q2975399|1=Yūki clan}}, and the {{ill|lt=Koga kubō|Q8017022|qid=Q8017022|1=Koga kubō}}, among others. === Rituals === Each year on November 21, a festival is held in which a mikoshi decorated with millet ears and distinctive red-and-white mizuhiki cords known as “Awamusubi” is paraded. This event is known as the “Awagara Mikoshi custom.”{{Cite book|Japanese|url=https://ndlsearch.ndl.go.jp/books/R100000002-I000008512661|editor=Association for Historical Walks in Tochigi Prefecture|title=Historical Walks of Tochigi Prefecture|year=1997|publisher=Yamakawa Publishing}} === Cultural properties === === Designated Tangible Cultural Properties (City-designated) === * Awa Shrine documents (10 items), including the Tawara Tōta prayer text{{Cite web|Japanese|url=https://sitereports.nabunken.go.jp/ja/22542 |title=Oyama City Cultural Property Protection Survey Annual Report 17 – Comprehensive Database of Archaeological Site Reports |website=Nara National Research Institute for Cultural Properties |accessdate=2018-10-14}} * Festival illustrated votive plaque (ema) * Railway-themed ema (on display at the Oyama City Museum) === Intangible Folk Cultural Properties (City-designated) === * Daidai Kagura{{Cite web|Japanese|url=http://www.city.oyama.tochigi.jp/soshiki/56/1772.html |title=Cultural Properties of Oyama City (Intangible Folk Cultural Properties) |website=Oyama City Official Website |accessdate=2018-10-14}} * Awagara Mikoshi custom === Natural Monuments (City-designated) === * Fir tree grove{{Cite web|Japanese|url=http://www.city.oyama.tochigi.jp/soshiki/56/2140.html |title=Cultural Properties of Oyama City (Natural Monuments) |website=Oyama City Official Website |accessdate=2018-10-14}} === On-site information === ;Address * Awamiya 1615, {{ill|lt=Oyama City|Q374511|qid=Q374511|1=Oyama, Tochigi}}, {{ill|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|Q44843|qid=Q44843|1=Tochigi Prefecture}} ;Access * Nearest station: JR {{ill|lt=Tōhoku Main Line|Q681190|qid=Q681190|1=Tōhoku Main Line}}, {{ill|lt=Mito Line|Q302388|qid=Q302388|1=Mito Line}}, or {{ill|lt=Ryōmō Line|Q253391|qid=Q253391|1=Ryōmō Line}} — get off at {{ill|lt=Oyama Station|Q801312|qid=Q801312|1=Oyama Station}}, then about 20 minutes by car === Notes === === References === {{Reference help}} {{Reflist}} === Related articles === * {{ill|lt=Oyama clan|Q11459903|qid=Q11459903|1=Oyama clan}} {{Shinto sidebar}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Awa Shrine (Oyama)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Awa Shrine (Oyama)]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]] [[Category:栃木県の旧郷社]] [[Category:History of Koyama]] [[Category:小山市の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tochigi Prefecture]]
